## Improvements

Scratchpad Polish — The Scratchpad now has a wider writing surface, a sticky header, cleaner Write/Preview controls, and page-level scrolling for long notes.

Markdown Preview Refinement — Tables now use Miko's design system, preserve GFM alignment, include accessible column headers, and handle wide content more gracefully.

Editor Resize Stability — The write surface now recalculates its height when the window or sidebars resize, preventing wrapped notes from being clipped.
